mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staff WHERE is_inner = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lesson WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sc.paid_amount), 0) FROM student_course sc WHERE sc.add_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND sc.deleted = 0
SELECT DATE(sc.add_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM student_course sc WHERE sc.add_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND sc.deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(sc.add_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT c.id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, COUNT(sc.id) AS totalCount FROM course c LEFT JOIN student_course sc ON c.id = sc.course_id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND (sc.deleted = 0 OR sc.deleted IS NULL) GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY totalCount DESC LIMIT 5
